channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: June 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to September 01, 2013
item.description: June 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 01, 2013; EB-3 India to December 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Kartik Sharma IPL 2025: CSK Star's Match-Winning Half-Century
item.description: Young CSK batter Kartik Sharma finally justified his record IPL 2025 signing with a match-winning 52 against MI, guided by mentorship from Dhoni and Fleming. CSK won by 12 runs in a crucial victory that could shape their playoff push.

item.title: Rajasthan Royals Ownership 2026: Lakshmi Mittal Joins IPL Consortium
item.description: Lakshmi Mittal joins Rajasthan Royals' ownership consortium alongside Aadar Poonawala and existing principal owner Manoj Badale, bringing world-class financial expertise and global business networks to the IPL franchise heading into 2025. This consortium model strengthens RR's infrastructure, recruitment strategy, and competitive positioning for future campaigns.

item.title: Ek Din Now in Theatres: Junaid Khan & Sai Pallavi's Romantic Drama
item.description: Ek Din, starring Junaid Khan and Sai Pallavi in their first on-screen pairing, is now playing in US theatres. This soft romantic drama from Aamir Khan Productions offers authentic storytelling and earned recognition during special promotional theatre visits. Streaming details coming soon.

item.title: EB-2 India June 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Modest Movement Expected
item.description: EB-2 India is predicted to move forward by 13-28 days in June 2026, with the most likely outcome being approximately 18 days forward to August 2, 2014. Retrogression risk remains very low at this point in the fiscal year, though applicants should remain cautious as the traditionally volatile July-September period approaches.

item.title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: Rahul Leads Scoring Race
item.description: KL Rahul dominates IPL 2026's Orange Cap with commanding run-scoring, while Jofra Archer has climbed to No. 2 on the Purple Cap table. Both stars are delivering match-changing performances as the tournament heats up. Here's how to catch all the action from the US.

item.title: King Leak Photos: SRK & Deepika's New Bollywood 2025 Drama
item.description: Director Siddharth Anand issued a formal warning after leaked set photos from King (starring Shah Rukh Khan and Deepika Padukone) went viral on social media. The new Bollywood 2025 action-drama filmed in Cape Town sparked massive fan excitement, but the filmmakers are urging audiences to respect the creative process and stop sharing unauthorized content. Theatrical release expected late 2025/early 2026, with streaming to follow on Prime Video or Hotstar.

item.title: Starc's IPL 2025 Firepower Impresses: Australia Star Proves Point
item.description: Mitchell Starc's aggressive IPL 2025 return has impressed cricket analyst David Bishop. Working strategically with Kyle Jamieson, Starc is using his firepower to silence Indian batters like Jaiswal. For US-based Indian cricket fans, streaming services like Willow TV and YouTube highlight uploads make it easy to catch the action without losing sleep.

item.title: NZ vs Bangladesh T20I: Lennox Debut, Saifuddin Back | 2026
item.description: New Zealand handed young prospect Lennox his T20I debut while recalling fast bowler Ben Sears, and Bangladesh brought back all-rounder Saifuddin. For India cricket fans tracking global talent and squad dynamics, these moves matter for understanding how top teams prepare for the big tournaments and bilateral series ahead.

item.title: Pagglait 2 Netflix 2026: Sanya Malhotra Returns in Sequel
item.description: Pagglait 2 is officially in development with Sanya Malhotra and director Umesh Bist returning for the Netflix sequel. Watch it on Netflix in the US with any active subscription when it releases.

item.title: Alia Bhatt Special Appearance in Tumbbad 2: Release Date & Streaming
item.description: Alia Bhatt's surprise appearance in Tumbbad 2 signals major backing for this unconventional folk horror sequel. Expect a 2026 theatrical release followed by streaming on Netflix or Prime Video—perfect for US-based Indian cinema fans seeking quality, unique storytelling beyond typical Bollywood fare.

item.title: Mitchell Santner Shoulder Injury: IPL 2025 Star Out for a Month
item.description: Mitchell Santner, Mumbai Indians' left-arm spinner, has been sidelined with a confirmed shoulder injury for at least a month after returning from IPL 2025. The injury significantly impacts Mumbai's squad balance mid-tournament, forcing the franchise to reorganize their bowling and all-rounder options. For US-based cricket fans, this is a reminder of how injuries can derail tournament dreams—catch all the action through Willow TV or ESPN+.

item.title: Jason Holder IPL 2026: Gujarat Titans' Game-Changer
item.description: Jason Holder has transformed Gujarat Titans' IPL 2026 campaign after replacing out-of-form Glenn Phillips, bringing balance, experience, and decisive moments when they matter most. For Indian diaspora in the US catching highlights, he's the fresh narrative making franchise cricket compelling beyond star power.

item.title: Bangladesh vs New Zealand T20I 2026: Rare Double-Series Win Possible
item.description: Bangladesh is on the brink of completing a historic double-series win over New Zealand in T20Is, with rain threatening to disrupt the third match in Dhaka. For Indian diaspora following cricket from the US, this moment showcases the sport's competitive expansion beyond traditional powerhouses and offers an alternative to India cricket coverage. If you're missing sleep-friendly timings for India vs Australia Test matches, this Bangladesh series presents a unique opportunity to witness cricket history in the making.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Sunrisers Hyderabad Chase 243: Klaasen & Head Lead IPL 2025 Win
item.description: Sunrisers Hyderabad proved they're IPL 2025 title contenders by chasing Mumbai Indians' 243 runs with 8 balls to spare. Travis Head's explosive 76 and Heinrich Klaasen's unbeaten 65 dominated the chase. This dominant performance shows why SRH have the firepower to win the tournament.

item.title: IPL 2025: Why Fair Cricket Isn't Good for Business, Says Muralidaran
item.description: Muralidaran reveals that IPL 2025 prioritizes entertainment and commercial viability over fair playing conditions—a deliberate business strategy. This shift influences how all Indian cricket, including international matches, is evolving and what audiences expect from the sport.

item.title: Rajasthan Royals' Riyan Parag Penalised for Vaping During IPL 2025
item.description: Riyan Parag faces BCCI disciplinary action for vaping during an IPL 2025 match against Punjab Kings, with the cricket board exploring stringent penalties including fines and possible match bans. Rajasthan Royals management may also face consequences. This incident highlights the BCCI's commitment to maintaining professional conduct standards in India cricket.

item.title: Orry Leaves Karan Johar's DCAA for CAN: What This Means for Bollywood 2026
item.description: Social media personality Orry has switched from Karan Johar's DCAA to Collective Artists Network, signaling potential expansion into OTT collaborations and major film promotions. For US-based Bollywood fans, this talent management shift could mean more behind-the-scenes access to Netflix India new movies and streaming content coverage.
